implementation_summary: Added one new injected Deps field, clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup: (groupId: string) => Promise<void>, to leaveGroupImpl.ts's Deps type (mirroring clearMemberProfiles/clearPendingJoinRequestsForGroup/clearInviteLinksForGroup exactly), and invoked it unconditionally in the purge block immediately after clearInviteLinksForGroup/clearInviteExpiries — running on every leave path (solo/abandon, multi-member, no-mlsGroup fail-closed, corrupt-MLS-state fail-closed) regardless of last-member status. Wired the concrete S1 function via `await import('@/src/lib/marmot/pendingDirectInviteStorage')` at MarmotContext.tsx's existing leaveGroup Deps-construction site (:1717, :1738), alongside the sibling dynamic imports for clearPendingJoinRequestsForGroup/clearInviteLinksForGroup. Deliberately used clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup (S1's per-group export), never clearAllPendingDirectInvites (S2's zero-arg account-wide export) — the two are distinct named exports specifically to prevent this confusion (S1's architecture.json / VQ-S1-007).

verification.typecheck: clean (npx tsc --noEmit -p . — 0 errors, unchanged from baseline)
